description.value: Generative AI tech transcribes patient-doctor interactions and documents those visits in electronic health records; AI-driven platform for clinician conversations.

description.value: Helps people remotely manage their heart health with connected devices like personal electrocardiograms; FDA-approved AI can detect 35 cardiac conditions.

citations.source_title: Most Promising Healthcare AI Startups of 2024, According to VCs
citations.quote: AliveCor helps people remotely manage their heart health with connected devices like personal electrocardiograms.

citations.source_title: Most Promising Healthcare AI Startups of 2024, According to VCs
citations.quote: In June, AliveCor launched its FDA-approved AI, which can detect 35 cardiac conditions including heart attacks.

description.value: AI-powered healthcare service with services available in the United States, Japan, India, and Singapore. Offers SaaS products for hospitals to AI-based symptom trackers.

citations.quote: Ubie is an AI-powered healthcare service with services available in the United States, Japan, India, and Singapore. With partnerships like Pfizer and Takeda, this startup offers a variety of services — from SaaS products for hospitals to AI-based symptom trackers.
